name: testBusinessUnitsListUpdatesOnCompanySelection
description: Check that selecting a company populates the 'Business units list', and when no company is selected, the list is empty with 'No items.'
descriptionHtml: Check that selecting a company populates the 'Business units list', and when no company is selected, the list is empty with 'No items.'

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Check that selecting a company populates the 'Business units list', and when no company is selected, the list is empty with 'No items.'

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: 'Business units list' title is visible
Verify: Business units list has expected count of 2
Verify: 'Merchant 1 for C112172' is in expected list
Verify: 'Merchant for C112172' is in expected list
Verify: 'Business units list' title is still visible
